reason: Audit semantic TUI coverage, 80/120-column behavior, readable status, and package gates.
Audit additive API compatibility, shared session IDs, event authority, and release alignment.
Check that validation and projections have one owner across backend, HTTP, events, and rendering.
Check borderless tonal layout, width-safe content, deterministic controls, and Prompt isolation.
Verify main uniqueness, auxiliary read-only behavior, command semantics, and ephemeral reset.
Verify lifecycle state remains event-derived and absent from stored transcript exports.
